llm_instruction: Use this file only after a candidate job was selected. Copy the BASF URL exactly from job.url; never construct job links.

job.title: GDD/GA - Full Stack Mobile Developer (M/F/D)
job.description: Responsibilities: • Working in a global agile Development and Operations environment, you need to have good communication skills to keep intensively aligned with our stakeholders and our team of technical and functional experts. • You will strongly cooperate with logistics consultants and other developers, mainly taking care about the further improvement and development of our mobile solutions within Site Logistics. • As a service provider it is our ultimate target to enable and support our internal business partners to achieve BASF business goals through providing best-in-class IT and digitalization support. • We expect you to demonstrate interpersonal skills and show an excellent team player attitude. • You should have the drive and the willingness to develop new professional skills. You have also a growth mindset oriented to results and you are self-motivated • You need to understand specific processes for IM and WM and know the integration points with other SAP Modules (MM, SD, FI, CO, TM, PP, QM etc.) • You will design and develop UI components, process flow logic and architecture and build up automation pipelines • Stay updated in latest changes in Flutter, Android and iOS versions and of the integrated development environment • You can work in a structured way in order to prepare and support documentation, alignments, community meetings and decision-making processes Qualifications: • Required: Successfully completed studies in computer science, business informatics or a comparable qualification • Plus: Knowledge in Site Logistics operations • Plus: Knowledge of full stack tools (e.g. DevOps Azure) • Required: Frontend development (Flutter Framework, Dart, BLoC Pattern) • Plus: Development experience in general • Flutter Development • Azure Environment (Devops, Automation/Pipelines, Authentication) • Fluent (written and spoken) in English • Plus : MS SQL • OpenAPI 3.0 and RESTful API’s and how to integrate these in a Flutter application • Android and iOS native development What we offer: Be part of a global leader in digital transformation, working in a vibrant Digital Hub that values innovation, agility, and cross-functional collaboration. Shape the future of BASF’s digital landscape, contributing to projects that drive sustainability and make a real impact. Thrive in a high-performance culture that supports your personal and professional growth, offering diverse learning opportunities and career development. Enjoy a modern, inclusive work...
